summary:
There are no consistently identifiable clinical features of COVID-19 that reliably differentiate it from influenza or other respiratory viruses. Clinical presentation is largely overlapping, making accurate diagnosis based solely on symptoms difficult without laboratory testing.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only two sentences focused exclusively on core clinical distinctions.) 

Final Answer:\boxed{B}
